title: CopilotSeatDetail
description: Details of a Copilot seat assignment for a user, including activity information and plan type.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the seat was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the seat was last updated.

pending_cancellation_date.description: Date when seat cancellation takes effect. Null if not pending cancellation.

last_activity_at.description: Timestamp of the user's last Copilot activity. Null if no activity recorded.

last_activity_editor.description: The IDE or editor used during the user's last Copilot activity. Null if no activity recorded.

last_authenticated_at.description: Timestamp of the user's last authentication with Copilot. Null if never authenticated.

plan_type.description: The Copilot plan type for this seat.

assignee.description: The GitHub user assigned to this seat.

assigning_team.description: The team through which this seat was assigned, if applicable.
